title: Add Dark Mode Toggle
description: Add a toggle button to switch between dark and light themes.
requirements: CSS custom properties for both themes
solution: Toggle data-theme attribute on HTML root. Define light/dark custom properties.

title: Build Video Search with Autocomplete
description: Implement search functionality that filters videos and shows autocomplete suggestions.
hints: Use input event with setTimeout debounce
solution: On input, filter video cards by title textContent.includes(query). Show autocomplete from preset suggestions.

title: Create a Video Player Page
description: Build a video player page with custom controls, recommended videos sidebar, and comments section.
requirements: Video player with custom controls (play/pause, progress, volume)
hints: Use CSS Grid for player+sidebar layout
solution: Build a two-column layout (player left, recommended right). Style the <video> element and overlay custom controls. Add a comments section below.
